# CamperWatch

> CamperWatch is a national campground intelligence directory for the United States. It provides verified campground data, insider booking strategies, loop-by-loop site guides, and community-sourced tips for federal, state, and private campgrounds.

CamperWatch covers campgrounds across the US with verified pricing, amenities, site-type breakdowns, known issues, real camper reviews, and direct booking links. Federal campground data is enriched with live data from the Recreation Information Database (RIDB) via the Recreation.gov API.

## What CamperWatch Provides

- Verified campground data: pricing, amenities, site types, hookups, max RV length, elevation, season
- Insider booking strategies: exact times to book, which sites/loops to request, cancellation tips
- Site-by-site guides: best sites by number, loop character, what to avoid
- Real community reviews sourced from Google, Yelp, Tripadvisor, Reddit, The Dyrt, Campendium, Recreation.gov
- Live facility data from Recreation.gov RIDB for federal campgrounds (NPS, USFS)
- Campaign intelligence: sentiment analysis, target audience, top positives/negatives per campground

## Campground Directory

### Lake Tahoe / Nevada / California
- [Tahoe Valley Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/tahoe-valley) — South Lake Tahoe, CA — Year-round, full hookups, family resort
- [Lake Tahoe KOA Journey](https://camperwatch.org/campground/lake-tahoe-koa) — South Lake Tahoe, CA — Heated pool, Echo Creek trails
- [Zephyr Cove RV & Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/zephyr-cove) — Zephyr Cove, NV — Beach, marina, paddlewheeler, RIDB #10097082
- [Camp Richardson Resort](https://camperwatch.org/campground/camp-richardson) — South Lake Tahoe, CA — Direct beach access, marina
- [Nevada Beach Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/nevada-beach) — Zephyr Cove, NV — Best campground at Tahoe, RIDB #232454
- [Fallen Leaf Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/fallen-leaf) — South Lake Tahoe, CA — Alpine lake, 206 sites, RIDB #232450
- [Davis Creek Regional Park](https://camperwatch.org/campground/davis-creek) — Washoe Valley, NV — Pine-shaded, Washoe Valley views
- [Mount Rose Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/mount-rose) — Reno, NV — 9,300ft elevation, RIDB #232186
- [Silver City RV Resort](https://camperwatch.org/campground/silver-city-rv) — Carson Valley, NV — Premier RV resort, 50A
- [Pyramid Lake Marina & RV Park](https://camperwatch.org/campground/pyramid-lake-marina) — Pyramid Lake, NV — Desert lake, world-class fishing
- [Washoe Lake State Park](https://camperwatch.org/campground/washoe-lake-state-park) — Washoe Valley, NV — State park, Carson Range views
- [Gold Ranch Casino & RV Resort](https://camperwatch.org/campground/gold-ranch-rv-verdi) — Verdi, NV — Full hookup, Sierra Nevada foothills

### National Parks
- [Watchman Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/watchman-campground) — Zion NP, UT — Inside Zion, Virgin River, RIDB #232445
- [Colter Bay Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/colter-bay-grand-teton) — Grand Teton NP, WY — Jackson Lake, marina, RIDB #258830
- [Madison Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/madison-yellowstone) — Yellowstone NP, WY — Geysers, Madison River, RIDB #232493
- [Moraine Park Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/moraine-park-rmnp) — Rocky Mountain NP, CO — Elk rut, glacier valley, RIDB #232463
- [Upper Pines Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/upper-pines-yosemite) — Yosemite NP, CA — Half Dome, Merced River, RIDB #232447
- [Sol Duc Hot Springs Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/sol-duc-olympic) — Olympic NP, WA — Old-growth rainforest, hot springs, RIDB #233116
- [Apgar Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/apgar-glacier) — Glacier NP, MT — Lake McDonald, Going-to-the-Sun Road, RIDB #232487
- [Mather Campground](https://camperwatch.org/campground/mather-grand-canyon) — Grand Canyon NP, AZ — South Rim, RIDB #232489

### State Parks & Other
- [Cape Lookout State Park](https://camperwatch.org/campground/cape-lookout-oregon) — Cape Lookout, OR — Oregon coast, Pacific views
- [Pfeiffer Big Sur State Park](https://camperwatch.org/campground/pfeiffer-big-sur) — Big Sur, CA — Coastal redwoods, Big Sur River
- [Ruby's Inn / Bryce Canyon](https://camperwatch.org/campground/rubys-inn-bryce) — Bryce Canyon, UT — Year-round near Bryce Canyon NP

## Key Pages

- [Search All Campgrounds](https://camperwatch.org/search) — Filter by state, site type, price, pet-friendly
- [Community Feed](https://camperwatch.org/community) — Camper posts, tips, and trip reports
- [Add Your Campground](https://camperwatch.org/add-campsite) — Owner portal for campground submissions
- [Contact CamperWatch](https://camperwatch.org/contact) — Questions, corrections, partnerships

## Data Sources

Federal campground data is sourced from the Recreation Information Database (RIDB) — the official federal recreation database maintained by Recreation.gov and 12 participating federal agencies (NPS, USFS, BLM, USBR, FWS, USACE, TVA, NARA, BOR, DOD, NPS, USDA). Community reviews are paraphrased from public sources including Google Reviews, Yelp, Tripadvisor, Reddit, The Dyrt, and Campendium.
